home.title: Brazilian basketball talent, curated for Japanese clubs.
home.subtitle: GutoSpringSports helps clubs understand Brazilian players, coaches, and staff through bilingual profiles, verified context, and video highlights.
home.curation_text: Each profile is prepared to make evaluation faster, with key bio, team history, measurements, and highlights in one place.
home.bridge_text: We focus on the practical details that help Japanese clubs evaluate Brazilian basketball talent with more confidence.
home.profiles_text: Every talent has a clean read-only profile that can be shared directly with decision makers.

footer.tagline: Bridging Brazilian talent with Japanese basketball

about.title: A focused scouting bridge between Brazilian basketball and Japanese clubs.
about.intro: GutoSpringSports was created to make Brazilian basketball talent easier to evaluate, understand, and share with clubs in Japan.
about.mission_1: We organize player, coach, and staff information into profiles that are clear, bilingual, and useful for real club conversations.
about.mission_2: The goal is not to overwhelm teams with a marketplace. It is to give them the right context, the right media, and a direct view of each professional's background.
about.clubs_text: A faster way to review Brazilian talent before deeper evaluation or direct discussions.
about.talent_text: A professional profile that presents career context, biography, photos, and highlights in English and Japanese.
about.context_text: Profiles are structured for scanning, comparing, and sharing internally with staff.
about.how_text: Open the catalog, filter by role or position, then share the individual profile link with the people who need to review that talent.
